title: Dental Implants
shortDesc: Permanent tooth replacement with titanium implants that look, feel, and function like natural teeth. Restore your smile with lasting confidence.

title: Orthodontic Braces
shortDesc: Straighten misaligned teeth with modern metal, ceramic, and self-ligating braces customized for every age group.

title: Root Canal Treatment
shortDesc: Advanced painless root canal therapy to save infected teeth using rotary endodontics and digital imaging.

title: Crown & Bridge
shortDesc: High-quality porcelain and zirconia crowns & bridges to restore damaged or missing teeth with natural aesthetics.

title: Dental Gum Surgery
shortDesc: Advanced treatment to control gum infections through scaling, root planing, and specialized procedures like bone grafts and flap surgery.

title: Cosmetic Gum Surgery
shortDesc: Also known as gum plastic surgery, this procedure corrects gum height for people who feel their gums are too high, too low, or teeth too long.

title: Tooth Removal
shortDesc: Safe and painless tooth extractions including wisdom tooth removal under local or sedation anesthesia.

title: Dentures
shortDesc: Custom-made complete and partial dentures designed for maximum comfort, stability, and a natural appearance.

title: Dental Fillings
shortDesc: Durable and aesthetic tooth-colored composite fillings to restore cavities and strengthen damaged teeth seamlessly.

title: Pediatric Dentistry
shortDesc: Gentle and fun dental care for children including fluoride treatments, sealants, and early orthodontic assessments.

title: Cardiac and Diabetic Dental Care
shortDesc: Specialized dental management for patients with heart conditions or diabetes, ensuring safe and effective treatments.

title: Pregnancy Dental Care
shortDesc: Safe and personalized oral health care for expectant mothers to maintain healthy gums and teeth during pregnancy.

title: Laser Dentistry
shortDesc: Minimally invasive laser treatments for gum reshaping, cavity treatment, and soft tissue procedures with faster healing.

title: Dental Bleaching
shortDesc: Clinical-grade bleaching solutions that lighten stained and discolored teeth by multiple shades safely.

title: Dental Jewellery
shortDesc: Add a touch of sparkle to your smile with safe, painless dental crystals and gems bonded to your tooth surface.

title: Dental Veneers
shortDesc: Thin, custom-made porcelain shells bonded to the front of teeth to correct shape, color, and minor alignment issues.

title: Diastema Closure
shortDesc: Professional treatment to close gaps between teeth using bonding, veneers, or orthodontics for a unified smile.

title: Gum Depigmentation
shortDesc: Advanced laser treatment to remove dark spots or pigmentation from gums, restoring a healthy pink appearance.

title: Orthodontic Care
shortDesc: Comprehensive orthodontic solutions including clear aligners and modern braces for aesthetic teeth straightening.

title: Smile Designing
shortDesc: Complete smile makeovers using digital planning, veneers, and precision cosmetic techniques for a Hollywood smile.

title: Tooth Coloured Restorations
shortDesc: Natural-looking ceramic and composite restorations that blend perfectly with your existing teeth for a flawless look.

title: Zirconia Crowns
shortDesc: Ultra-strong, metal-free zirconia crowns that offer superior strength and a natural, translucent appearance.

title: Implants Dentistry
shortDesc: Replacement tooth roots made of biocompatible titanium. They provide a strong foundation for fixed teeth, prevent bone loss, and maintain natural facial shape and density.

title: Infection Control
shortDesc: We follow 4-stage sterilization: scrubbing, ultrasonic cleaning, autoclaving in disposable wraps, and UV storage. Strict hygiene protocols ensure a 100% safe environment.
